title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 28 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 28/06/2022
Image reference: 2022-06-28_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-june-28-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Supramax Bao Wealth (53,600 DWT, Jun 2005, Yangzhou Dayang Shipbuilding) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 14.80 mil, VV Value USD 13.82 mil. Handy BC Eva Bulker (38,200 DWT, May 2012, Naikai) sold to Devbulk Shipping for USD 23.00 mil, VV Value USD 23.34 mil - SS Due. Handy BC Super Valentina (33,400 DWT, Feb 2013, Shin Kurushima Onishi) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 22.00 mil, VV Value USD 21.03 mil - BWTS Fitted.
